mechanics.excerpt: CHARACTER_CREATION TO SERVE AND PROTECT Even in the thirty-first century; crime iS fact of life Though they go by various names ad wear various uniforms all societies in known space require police forces that share common skills and goals. Service on police torce can be every bit as dangerous as on the front lines in Mech.
